name: FETAL SKELETAL DYSPLASIA
chapter: DIFFERENTIAL DIAGNOSIS OF OBSTETRIC AND GYNECOLOGIC
definition: DWARFISM heterogeneous group of bone growth disorders resulting in abnormal shape + size of the absence of limb absence of distal parts shortening involves entire limb (eg, humerus, radius + ulna, hand) shortening involves proximal segment (ie, humerus / femur) shortening involves intermediate segment (ie, radius + ulna / tibia + extra digit on radial / tibial side shortening involves distal segment (eg, hand) partial absence of a limb proximal reduction with distal parts attached to trunk extra digit on ulnar / fibular side disproportionate shortening of entire leg syndrome characterized by
discriminating_features: limb shortening of 40-60% of the mean in thanatophoric dysplasia + OI type II
limb shortening of > 30% of the mean in achondrogenesis

general: limb shortening of 40-60% of the mean in thanatophoric dysplasia + OI type II
limb shortening of > 30% of the mean in achondrogenesis
"hitchhiker's thumb", radial ray anomaly, absence of thumb
micrognathia, short upper lip, abnormally shaped ears

clinical.Prognosis: 51% mortality ← hypoplastic lungs: 23% stillbirths, 32% death in 1st week of life
